headline: European business schools in charts
summary: FT ranking specialists explore the diversity of students and faculty, alumni salaries, and what is taught where
body_text:
Average alumni ratings for selected reasons, scored out of 10

Proportion of non-locals at schools in three regions (%)

Female faculty, board and students, by schools’ region and programme (%)

Number of business schools from each country/region in the FT’s 2024 MiM, MBA and EMBA rankings (out of the top 100 institutions)

The number of institutions in the top tiers of the 2024 tables, by country; tier sizes vary between programmes

EMBA is not shown as the top tier includes programmes offered jointly by schools in multiple countries or run by institutions in countries other than their main location

Alumni of ranked European schools, by age when they started their programmes (%)
